name: social-impact-accountability-v2
description: Notifies advertisers, regulators, and civil society on confirmed high-confidence verdicts. Supports DOCX letters, email/webhook delivery, and outbound phone calls.

steps.name: determine-tier
steps.prompt_template: Evaluate verdict: {{input.verdict_json}}. Determine action tier: Tier 1 (confidence >= 0.80), Tier 2 (confidence >= 0.85, recommended_action=notify), Tier 3 (confidence >= 0.90, recommended_action=escalate-legal). Return tier number and justification.

steps.name: draft-advertiser-notice
steps.prompt_template: Draft a formal DOCX advertiser notification using Word/DOCX and humanizer skills. Template: advertiser-notice. Tone: formal. Include: claim text, verdict, confidence score, evidence summary, request to suspend ad placements on {{input.verdict_json.actor}} properties. Verdict: {{input.verdict_json}}.

steps.name: draft-regulator-complaint
steps.prompt_template: Draft a formal DOCX regulatory complaint using Word/DOCX and humanizer skills. Template: regulatory-complaint. Tone: legal. Address to: Slovak Press Council (Tlačová rada), RTVS Council, EU DSA enforcement body. Include full evidence package. Verdict: {{input.verdict_json}}.

steps.name: phone-outreach
steps.prompt_template: Use agent-phone-call skill to place outbound calls to trust-and-safety contacts and journalists. Script template: journalist-briefing. Max duration: 180 seconds. Briefing context: {{regulator_complaint_doc}}. Target contacts: {{input.contact_list}}.

steps.name: deliver-notifications
steps.prompt_template: Deliver all prepared notifications via api-gateway and automation-workflows skills. Channels: email, webhook, signal. Attach documents: {{advertiser_notice_doc}}, {{regulator_complaint_doc}}. Log all delivery confirmations.
